goal: common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g).subset(target) = forall(x0: T) { common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g).contains(x0) implies target.contains(x0) }
forall(x0: T) { not common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g).contains(x0) or target.contains(x0) } = common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g).subset(target)
forall(x0: T) { not common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g).contains(x0) or target.contains(x0) } = true
proof: let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g) and not w0 ∈ target }
function(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ common_fixed_point_set[T](f, g) or x0 ∈ target }(w0)

function[T0](x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[P](common_pre_fixed_point_set[P](f, g), pre_fixed_point_set[P](compose[P, P, P](f, g)))

function[T0](x0: lib(set_base).Set[T0], x1: lib(set_base).Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[P](common_post_fixed_point_set[P](f, g), post_fixed_point_set[P](compose[P, P, P](f, g)))
